languages.title: Lengguåhi
languages.subtitle: Pili i fino' ni' ma'usa gi todu i app.
languages.noResults: Tåya' lengguåhi ni' parehu yan i inaligao-mu.

phone.label: Numero tilifon
phone.selectCountry: Pili i nasion pat i lugåt
phone.searchCountry: Lina'la' i nasion, i kodu, pat i prefix ni' para un li'e'
phone.noCountries: Tåya' nasion ni' parehu yan i inaligao-mu.
phone.tooShort: Ti åpmam este na numeron tilifon.
phone.tooLong: Este na numeron tilifon gof lå'la'.
phone.invalid: Na'halom un numeron tilifon ni' bali para i nasion ni' un selekta.
phone.valid: Numåran tilifon ni' bali gi i enteru mundo

auth.onboardingTagline: Un kompañero ni' para u na'siguru na maolek yu' gi i tiempo siha gi entre "Maolek yu'" yan "Malago' yu' ayudo."
auth.createSubtitle: Cho'gue un manera para un prutehi i grafik-mu.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Ti siña in kumple i siñat-måmi. Chek i koneksion-mu ya prutehi ta'lo.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Usan un sesion development gi i lugåt. Native Google Sign-In ha cho'gue gi un development build.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Para ya o sigue y añadilo despues.
auth.northStarBody: I VL01 na siña ma'usa siña ha na'fanhuyong i safety flows gi i tap yan i långhet na gestu siha.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: I maolek na kompañero-mu gi i mapa yan gi i inagang siha.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear siña ha ayuda gi i home mode, guardian mode, emergency mode, excuse calls, yan voice support.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Ma'usa para i mapa, i lugåt peligro, i safu na finatto, yan i SOS na konteksto.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving ha faisen put i lugat para u ma tungo' i manma'gås-ñiha håfa na lugåt siña ma nisisita ayudo. Siña un na'lå'la' este gi i Settings.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: I notisia siha ma supotte i che'cho' yan i emergency events.
permissions.notificationsBody: In u'usa ha' i notisia siha para i siñat siha put i inañadi, i inadelantan i emergency, yan i manma'å'ñao na siñat siha ni' un na'setbe.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: I lugat ha na'siguru na maolek i kontekston inañadi
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ha usa i lugat-mu para i mapa, i lugåt siha ni' peligro, i quick share, yan i SOS na konteksto. Siña un na'lå'la' este gi i Settings.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: I abisu siha put inañadi nisisåriu na u ma na'i notisia
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ha na'hanao i manma'pos na che'cho', i manma'pos na ineppe siha, yan i manma'pos na ineppe siha ni' un na'setbe. Ti in usa i notisia siha para i anunsio siha.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: I mikrofon ha na'fanmetgot i inagang siha
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ha usa i mikrofon-mu ha' yanggen un tutuhon un AI na inagang para i kompañero pat i safety call.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ha usa Bluetooth para u parehu yan NorthStar na alahas, taitai i estao i koneksion, yan ha na'fanhuyong i safety flows ginen i wearable.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving ha na'guaha este na lina'la' ginen i Settings yan i dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Pili i bos ni' mas safu para un hungok.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Silensiu na inatan para i inañadi kada diha.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Na'i i taotao ni' un konfi'a i kuentos-mu.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Singko na tåya' siña ma'eskala asta SOS yan alertan i manma'gas.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Na'huyong un rason ni' maolek para un hånao ginen un sitbisiu ni' ti komfotme.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Tutuhon un ågang para i mangga'chong-mu yanggen malago' hao inayuda.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Pruba i safety flows gi un low-pressure demo.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Na'i i alahas gi fi'on-mu yanggen un eskan.
jewelry.noDevices: Ti ma sodda' NorthStar na dipattamenton-måmi.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth ti siña ha tutuhon i eskan. På'go, prutehi ta'lo.
jewelry.scanFailed: Ti siña in sodda' alahas gi fi'on-måmi. Chek Bluetooth, na'siguru NorthStar, ya prutehi ta'lo.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth ti siña ha tutuhon i eskan. Chek Bluetooth ya un prutehi ta'lo.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Ma'apase i inañadi gi i dipattamenton-måmi. Na'i Bluetooth siñat gi i Settings, pues pruba ta'lo.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar gof åpmam para bai hu konekta. Na'hålom ya un prutehi ta'lo.
jewelry.connectFailed: Ti siña in konekta yan NorthStar. Chek kao esta ma'chågi yan gaige gi fi'on-ña, pues prutehi ta'lo.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Na'i NorthStar kårga ya gaige gi fi'on este na tilifon, pues eskan ta'lo.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Manaligao NorthStar na dipattamenton-måmi gi fi'on-måmi...

home.subtitle: Safety companion dashboard
home.readyBody: I bos, i mapa, i alahas, yan i manma'gås-ta, un tåmpe ha'.

map.title: Mapa put inañadi
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go preview; Mapbox ha na'fanhuyong gi un development build.
map.updateFailed: Ti siña in na'lå'la' i lugat-mu. På'go, prutehi ta'lo.
map.notRequested: Ti ma faisen i siñat para i lugat. Siña un na'siña gi i Settings.
map.permissionOff: Ti ma'ayek i lugat. Na'siña gi i Settings para u sentra i safety map gi hilo'-mu.
map.timeout: Mas lå'la' i lugat-mu ki i ma espipiha. Fanhånao para un lugat ni' mas klaru i sinyal-ña ya prutehi ta'lo.
map.savedEmptyTitle: Ti ma na'setbe i lugat siha på'go
map.savedEmptyMessage: I lugat siha ni' un konfi'a ni' un na'setbe para u fanmafa'nu'i guini para u fanma'ayek.

zones.crowding: Manma'a'ñao i taotao siha gi pupuengi
zones.lowLighting: Areglu ni' ti gof takhilo' i atdao

map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

messagesWaiting.one: %{count} mensåhi ni' ma'espipiha para u ma'entrega
messagesWaiting.other: %{count} na mensåhi siha manma'espipiha para u fanmana'i

safetyCall.useOffline: Usa i kompañero ni' ti gaige gi i internet
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Tutuhon i inagang pat tuge' un mensåhi yanggen listo hao.

history.clearTitle: Klåru i estoria put i fino'-mu?
history.clearMessage: Este ha na'suha i ma na'setbe na AI na mensåhi siha ginen este na dipattamenton.
history.deleteTitle: Kao un na'suha este na fino'?
history.title: Historia put i fino'-ta
history.subtitle: AI mensåhi siha ni' manma'a'agang gi este na dipattamenton.
history.empty: Tåya' na fino' CHamoru ma na'setbe på'go.
history.emptyMessage: I AI na fino'-mu para u fanhuyong guini despues di i fine'nina na inagang-mu.
history.loadFailed: Ti siña in na'halom i historian i fino'-ta. På'go, prutehi ta'lo.
history.clearFailed: Ti siña in na'suha i historian i fino'-måmi. På'go, prutehi ta'lo.
history.deleteFailed: Ti siña in na'suha ayu na fino'-ta. På'go, prutehi ta'lo.

voices.title: I bos-hu put i inagang-hu
voices.subtitle: Pili i bos ni' maolek para un hungok.
voices.sampleFailedTitle: Ti siña ma sodda' i muestra
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Ti siña ma tuge' este na muestran bos. På'go, prutehi ta'lo.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Usa i manma'a'agang na ineppe siha yanggen ti siña i red pat i Hume na kredensiåt siha.
settings.privacyBody: Na'huyong pat na'suha i dañuyan na infotmasion ni' ma na'setbe gi este na dipattamenton.
settings.deleteAll: Na'suha todu i dañuyan na infotmasion
settings.exportFailedMessage: Ti siña hu na'huyong i dañu-mu på'go.
settings.deleteConfirmTitle: Na'suha todu i dañuyan na infotmasion?
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Este ha na'suha i prugråma-mu, i setbisio-mu, i kontak-mu gi i emergency, i historian i fino'-mu, i manma'pos na permiso, yan i local auth session-mu ginen este na dipattamenton.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Ti siña hu na'suha i dañuyan na infotmasion på'go.
settings.linkFailed: Ti siña hu abri i link

sections.languageSubtitle: I inetnon yan i lengguåhen prumision sistema
sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, manma'gås-ñiha, yan manma'gås-ñiha gi i tiempon chinatsaga
sections.privacySubtitle: Historia, ma'ekspåtta, ma'apåsi, yan i polisia

settings.updateFailedMessage: Ti siña in na'setbe ayu na minalago'. På'go, prutehi ta'lo.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Sige ha' i sesion-mu. På'go, prutehi ta'lo.

contacts.title: Manma'å'ñao nu i lina'la'-ñiha
contacts.subtitle: Manma'å'ñao na taotao siha gi i tiempon safety flows.
contacts.addTitle: Adåpta i kontak gi i tiempon chinatsaga
contacts.name: Na'an
contacts.empty: Ti ma addåpta i kontak-mu gi i tiempon chinatsaga.
contacts.emptyTitle: Tåya' siña un kontak gi i tiempon chinatsaga
contacts.emptyMessage: Addåpta un taotao ni' un konfi'a ya u fanlisto yanggen nisisåriu para i safety flow.
contacts.removeMessage: Este na taotao ti u fanhuyong gi i emergency flow-mu.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Ti siña in na'setbe este na kontak. Chek i detalle siha ya prutehi ta'lo.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Ti siña in na'suha este na kontak. På'go, prutehi ta'lo.

friends.title: Amigu siha
friends.subtitle: Manma'gås-ta, fina'tinas-ta, yan grafikon emergency.
friends.emptyTitle: Ti guaha taotao gi i siñat-mu
friends.emptyMessage: Manmafa'nu'i i mangga'chong-mu yan i manma'gas-mu guini yanggen ma addåpta siha.

emergency.title: Emergensia SOS
emergency.subtitle: Na'lå'la' ha' yanggen malago' hao inayuda.
emergency.body: Este para u na'tungo' i safety flow-mu yan u na'listo i emergency contacts-mu.
emergency.addContact: Adåpta un emergency contact gi i Settings.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Esta listo i tinige' put i ina'ayuda gi i lugat. Na'daña' i backend share endpoint para un na'hanao i live links.

quickShare.title: På'go na inayek
quickShare.subtitle: Listo i lina'la' i taotao siha.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tap
capybearTap.subtitle: Doble-tap i NorthStar-mu para un na'huyong un safety orange.
capybearTap.body: Gesture route esta listo para i BLE event wiring.

errors.voiceOffline: Parehu ha' na ti gaige hao gi i internet. Para u ma na'hanao i mensåhi-mu yanggen un konekta ta'lo.
errors.voiceQueued: Ma na'setbe i mensåhi. Para u ma'apåsi yanggen i kompañero-ña i bos ha konekta ta'lo.
errors.voiceRetrying: Malago' yu' na bai hu na'hanao i mensåhi-mu ta'lo...
errors.microphone: Ma nisisita i mikrofon para i inagang. Siña un na'setbe gi i Settings, pat un tuge' un mensåhi.
errors.billing: Ti siña ma'usa i bos gi i internet. Siña un sigi ha' yan i kompañero ni' ti gaige gi i internet.
errors.authentication: Ti siña i kompañero-ña gi i bos ha verify este na sesion. Fanhålom ta'lo pat usa i offline na kompañero på'go.
errors.timeout: I bos i kompañero-ña ti åpmam para u ålok. Chek i koneksion-mu ya prutehi ta'lo.
errors.network: Ti siña in ågang i bos-ña. Chek i koneksion-mu, pues pruba ta'lo pat sigi ha' offline.
errors.genericVoice: Guåha ha na'fanlamen i inagang. Påtte ta'lo, pat sigi ha' yan i kompañero ni' ti gaige gi i internet.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving nisisåriu na guaha mikrofon-ña para i inañadi yan AI i inagang i mangga'chong-ña.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving ha usa i lugat-mu para i mapa yan i siñat siha gi fi'on-mu.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving ha usa Bluetooth para u konekta gi i NorthStar na alahas-mu.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Ti siña ma'usa este na opsión para humålom gi este na bersión.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: I demo mode ha usa ha' lokal na datos ni ti magahet. I konektådu na setbisiu siha ti autentikådu, yan para u ma-reset este na sesión anggen ma-load ta'lo i app.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Ti bålidu pat måkpo' tiempon-ña i verification code. Faisen nuebu na code ya chagi ta'lo.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Gof meggai na chagi para humålom. Nangga didide', ya chagi ta'lo.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Gof åpmam i verification para humålom. Cheke i koneksión-mu ya chagi ta'lo.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Ti in siña manhånao para i setbisiun humålom. Cheke i koneksión-mu ya chagi ta'lo.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Ti siña ma-load i safety map. Cheke i koneksión-mu ya chagi ta'lo.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Ti guaha live location. Mapopokkat i uttimon na lokasión-mu ni masåtba gi %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Ti in siña man-share i lokasión-mu. Cheke i location access ya chagi ta'lo.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Este i lokasión-hu ni marekot gi %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Este i uttimon na lokasión-hu ni masåtba yan marekot gi %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Matå'chong i aksesu para Bluetooth. Na'påra gi Settings, ya chagi ta'lo.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Matå'chong i Bluetooth. Na'påra, ya chagi ta'lo.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Ti guaha Bluetooth pairing gi este na device pat bersión.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Ti in siña sodda' i NorthStar. Po'lo gi hihot, cheke i Bluetooth, ya chagi ta'lo.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Ti masodda' NorthStar devices gi hihot. Po'lo gi hihot ya scan ta'lo.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Ti in siña man-connect gi NorthStar. Na'siguru na guaha batirihan-ña yan gaige gi hihot, ya chagi ta'lo.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Ti in siña satba este na lugåt. Chagi ta'lo.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Mababa i phone dialer; ti makonfetma i ågang.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Tåya' emergency contact ni guaha; tåya' ågang ni macho'gue.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Ti siña mababa i phone dialer; tåya' ågang ni macho'gue.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Ti siña makonfetma i uttimon na chagi SOS.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Ti guaha i voice companion på'go. Chagi ta'lo dispues pat kontinua yan i offline companion.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
